violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

Toum (garlic sauce) is made with raw egg whites. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2026
The food prep sink is lacking an air gap. The food prep sink shall be provided with an air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2026
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. -The person that is certified in food safety has a license that has expired on 5/1/2020. Staff must renew food safety license. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Staff provided paper towels during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, meat grinder) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

Knafeh (dessert made with mozzarella cheese) observed stored on the counter, out of temperature control at the time of this inspection. Per interview of staff, knafeh were placed on the counter in room temperature 1 hour prior to this inspection. Knafeh observed at 60 degrees Fahrenheit. Proper cold holding of ready-to-eat foods reviewed. Staff moved the knafeh to the walk-in cooler during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

Several ready-to eat foods (lamb, okra, chicken, rice) were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

Toum (garlic sauce) is made with raw egg whites. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. -A consumer advisory must be provided on the menu for toum. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025
Employees' medicines were observed stored in the food prep area. Staff removed the medicines away from food prep areas during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

Lamb was observed thawing in stagnant water in the food prep sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. -Staff turned the water on to thaw under running water during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

Plumbing underneath the 3 bay sink and 2 bay sink located in the kitchen area were not in good repair. Water observed leaking from pipes. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the fans in the prep station, fans in the 2 door North American refrigerator, and fans in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. -A mop sink shall be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2026
